sourceMovie.title: Over the Hedge
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Over the Hedge works as a family movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The family and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Ice Age
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Over the Hedge clicked for you, Ice Age (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in family and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Over the Hedge?
faq.answer: Try Ice Age, Puss in Boots, Penguins of Madagascar—each shares DNA with Over the Hedge while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Over the Hedge?
faq.answer: Over the Hedge (2006) is best described as Family, Comedy, Animation, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Over the Hedge worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this family lane.
